case_title: ROYAL COACH TOURS, INC. VS. SYLVESTER JOSEPH GARCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY BERNARD AVELER--COACH DRIVER AND SANDRA S. ALLEN--PRESIDENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE CROSS--COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
